message:
test(fcp-cli): expand test coverage across 6 modules (698→920 unit tests)

Added ~222 new unit tests across install, trace, manifest, package,
budget, and repair modules. Covers serde roundtrips, builder patterns,
print functions, edge cases, and boundary conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
